title: AKBS-021 Adulterous Wives Desire Lost Paradise - Mari Yamaguchi
overview: There are various reasons why a wife cannot be embraced by her husband. Sometimes they are sexless, sometimes they lose their husbands, and sometimes they are just for a living. Will I be able to take advantage of such a gap in my heart, or will I go on my own... Depicts the greedy sex of married women who are addicted to the quagmire of adultery.
